name: Case Study
history: History of isolation and chronic depression since late adolescence. Past difficulties with friendships. Recent breakup preceding a relapse into a depressive episode. History of taking SSRIs and recent medication adjustments following the relapse.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I need to be perfect to be accepted.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of relationships and social situations.
situation: Engaged in a conversation with a friend about mental health struggles.
auto_thought: They will think less of me if they know how I really feel.
behavior: Withdrawal from social interactions and reluctance to seek help.
